visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient background on landing page, floating gradient orbs/blobs on landing page (purple, blue, green circles), footer and gallery subtitle text appears smaller than 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable emoji-based object buttons, playful tone in Spark chat, low text density, friendly CTAs, toolbar icons all have text labels; minor deduction for AI chat text density

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, pill-shaped buttons, toolbar design, and type hierarchy across pages; slight drift between landing gradient background and builder/gallery backgrounds

visual-accessibility.notes: Clear text labels on all toolbar and object icons; some gray subtitle text on white/light backgrounds appears below 4.5:1 contrast; no visible focus rings; responsiveness not confirmable from screenshots
